title: Run Bundle Validation Decision
description: Deterministic BD validation decision produced when a run-bundle manifest is validated against the governed bundle contract.

decision_id.description: Unique identifier for this validation decision.

run_id.description: run_id of the bundle being validated.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 datetime when this decision was produced.

valid.description: True only when all hardening rules pass.

failure_type.description: Most severe failure type, or null when valid.

triggering_conditions.description: List of all individual validation error strings.

required_actions.description: Actionable steps required to resolve all failures.

bundle_summary.description: Concise summary of key bundle fields for auditing.

notes.description: Human-readable summary of the decision outcome.
